search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: Sitzprobe Sitzprobe is a German term used in opera and musical theatre to describe a seated rehearsal —the literal translation of Sitzprobe —where the singers sing with the orchestra, focusing attention on integrating the two groups. It is often the first rehearsal where the orchestra and singers rehearse tog
